zh., Chelmsford, Essex, England: 英國艾可傑爾姆斯福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當John William Gylder於大約1510年出生在英國艾可傑爾姆斯福德時，他的父親John Gylder20歲，母親Mary Gildea20歲。他於1541年7月10日與Margette Wolfytts在英國艾可傑爾姆斯福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1940年住在美國康乃狄克州費艾費爾德丹波瑞。他去世於1555年5月19日在英國英格蘭艾可傑爾姆斯福德享年46歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可傑爾姆斯福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John William Gylder于大约1510年出生在英国艾可傑爾姆斯福德时，他的父亲John Gylder20岁，母亲Mary Gildea20岁。他于1541年7月10日与Margette Wolfytts在英国艾可傑爾姆斯福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1940年住在美国康涅狄格州費艾費爾德丹波瑞。他去世于1555年5月19日在英国英格兰艾可傑爾姆斯福德享年46岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可傑爾姆斯福德。

nameMeanings.name: Gylder
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): in northern England usually a variant of Geldard, an occupational name from Middle English gelde ‘sterile, barren’, used as a noun to denote ‘gelded cattle’, + Old English hierde, hence ‘herdman who tends the gelded cattle’.
English: alternatively, perhaps an occupational name from Middle English gelder(e) ‘gelder, castrator (of livestock)’.

variants.name: Gilder
meanings: English (Essex and Middlesex): occupational name for a goldsmith or gilder, from Middle English gilder, gelder, guldar, a derivative of Old English gyldan ‘to gild’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When John William Gylder was born about 1510, in Chelmsford, Essex, England, his father, John Gylder, was 20 and his mother, Mary Gildea, was 20. He married Margette Wolfytts on 10 July 1541, in Chelmsford, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. He lived in Danbury, Fairfield, Connecticut, United States in 1940. He died on 19 May 1555, in Chelmsford, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 46, and was buried in Chelmsford, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John William Gylder est né environ 1510, à Chelmsford, Essex, Angleterre, son père, John Gylder, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Mary Gildea, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Margette Wolfytts le 10 juillet 1541, à Chelmsford, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Il a vécu à Danbury, Fairfield, Connecticut, États-Unis en 1940. Il est décédé le 19 mai 1555, à Chelmsford, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Chelmsford, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John William Gylder um 1510 in Chelmsford, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Gylder 20 und seine Mutter Mary Gildea 20. Er hat am 10. Juli 1541 in Chelmsford, Essex, England Margette Wolfytts geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1940 hat er in Danbury, Fairfield, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 19. Mai 1555 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Chelmsford, Essex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Chelmsford, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John William Gylder è nato il circa 1510 nel Chelmsford, Essex, England, il suo padre, John Gylder, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Mary Gildea, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Margette Wolfytts il 10 luglio 1541, nel Chelmsford, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Vissuto a Danbury, Fairfield, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1940. Morì il 19 maggio 1555, nel Chelmsford, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Chelmsford, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja., Chelmsford, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスチェルムスフォード
ja.lifeSummary: John William Gylderが約1510年にイギリスエセックスチェルムスフォードで生まれた時，父John Gylderは20歳，母Mary Gildeaは20歳であった。1541年7月10日にイギリスエセックスチェルムスフォードでMargette Wolfyttsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1940年にはアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ファイルフィールドダンブリーに住んでいた。彼は1555年5月19日にイギリスイギリスエセックスチェルムスフォードで46歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスチェルムスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John William Gylder(이)가 대략 1510년 영국 에세스 헬스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Gylder(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Gildea(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1541년 7월 10일 영국 에세스 헬스퍼드에서 Margette Wolfytts(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1940년도에 미국 코네티컷 주 파어필드 단아버이에서 살았다. 그는 1555년 5월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 헬스퍼드에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 헬스퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John William Gylder nasceu aproximadamente 1510, em Chelmsford, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Gylder, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Mary Gildea, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Margette Wolfytts em 10 de julho de 1541, em Chelmsford, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele viveu em Danbury, Fairfield, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América em 1940. Ele faleceu em 19 de maio de 1555, em Chelmsford, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Chelmsford, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John William Gylder родился около 1510 г. в местности челмсфорд, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Gylder было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Gildea, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Margette Wolfytts 10 июля 1541 г. в местности челмсфорд, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Он жил в местности данбури, феирфиелд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в 1940 году. Он умер 19 мая 1555 г. в местности челмсфорд, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности челмсфорд, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John William Gylder nació aproximadamente 1510, en Chelmsford, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Gylder, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Mary Gildea, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Margette Wolfytts el 10 de julio de 1541, en Chelmsford, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Vivió en Danbury, Fairfield, Connecticut, Estados Unidos en 1940. Murió el 19 de mayo de 1555, en Chelmsford, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Chelmsford, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
